message.content:
@startuml
actor PowerUser
participant ":EnergyConsumptionInPeriodUI" as UI
participant ":EnergyConsumptionInPeriodCTRL" as CTRL
participant ":RoomList" as RL
participant ":Room" as Room
participant ":Device" as Device
participant ":ReadConfigFile" as RCF
participant ":ReadingList" as ReadingList
participant ":Reading" as Reading

PowerUser -> UI: 1 Get Total Metered Energy Consumption
UI --> PowerUser: 2 Show Options: Device,Room,Grid
PowerUser -> UI: 3 Choose Room option
UI -> CTRL: 4 rLs=showRoomListInStr()
CTRL -> Room: 5 rLs=showRoomListInStr()
Room --> CTRL: 
CTRL --> UI: 
UI --> PowerUser: 6 Show Room List
PowerUser -> UI: 7 Choose a Room
UI --> PowerUser: 8 Ask for the time interval
PowerUser -> UI: 9 Input the time interval
UI -> CTRL: 10 tMe=getEnergyConsumptionInPeriod(index, start, end)
CTRL -> Room: 11 tMe=getEnergyConsumptionInPeriod(index, start, end)
Room -> Device: 12 tMe = getEnergyConsumptionInPeriod(start, end)
Device -> RCF: 13 i=getDevicesMeteringPeriod()
RCF --> Device: 
Device -> ReadingList: 14 tMe=getValueOfReadingsInTimeInterval(start, end)
ReadingList -> Reading: 15 v=returnValueOfReading
Reading --> ReadingList: 
ReadingList --> Device: 
Device --> Room: 
Room --> CTRL: 
CTRL --> UI: 
UI --> PowerUser: 16 Show Total Metered Energy Consumption in the Room
@enduml
